data.title: Whale Deposits 5,532 ETH on HyperLiquid for Sale
data.description: A significant crypto whale, identified as '0xed4,' has deposited 5,532 ETH on HyperLiquid for sale, according to ChainCatcher. This transaction, valued at approximately $13 million, occurred within the past 24 hours. The whale also closed its 20x ETH short position on HyperLiquid but continues to hold a similar position on Lighter.

data.title: Crypto Fear & Greed Index Rises to 46, Maintains Neutral Stance
data.description: The Crypto Fear & Greed Index, monitored by CoinMarketCap, has increased to 46, marking a two-point rise from the previous day while remaining in neutral territory. According to NS3.AI, CoinMarketCap explained that the index is calculated using various factors, including price movements of the top 10 cryptocurrencies, market volatility, derivatives data, the Stablecoin Supply Ratio, and its proprietary search data.

data.title: Arthur Hayes Predicts Bitcoin Surge Amid Credit Expansion
data.description: Arthur Hayes, speaking at Korea Blockchain Week on April 10, 2026, projected that Bitcoin could surpass $1 million due to a $15.2 trillion credit expansion by 2028. According to NS3.AI, Hayes highlighted the U.S. government's use of the Genius Act and stablecoin regulations to establish price-inelastic buyers for short-term Treasury bills. Hayes' analysis suggests that these financial maneuvers could significantly impact Bitcoin's valuation in the coming years.

data.title: Babylon Foundation Deposits $3 Million USDT into Aave
data.description:
Babylon Foundation announced on the X platform that it will deposit $3 million USDT into Aave, with $2 million allocated to V3 and $1 million to V4. According to ChainCatcher, this move demonstrates Babylon Foundation's support and confidence in Aave and the broader DeFi ecosystem.

Any interest generated from this deposit will be returned to the Aave ecosystem through the Aave x Babylon integration, incentivizing both current recovery efforts and future adoption.

data.title: Japanese and South Korean stock markets both hit new highs.
data.description: Both Japanese and South Korean stock markets hit new highs, with the Nikkei 225 index currently up 0.47% and the South Korean KOSPI index up over 1%. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Central Command: 38 ships have been ordered to turn back or return to Iranian ports.
data.description: U.S. Central Command ordered 38 ships to return to Iranian ports. (Golden Ten)

data.title: The progress of the crypto market structure bill has stalled, and May 25 may become a key deadline.
data.description: Recent public progress on the crypto market structure bill has been limited, with Memorial Day on May 25th considered a crucial timeframe for legislative advancement. Market observers believe that missing this window could further hinder progress as the summer election cycle begins. Issues including stablecoin yields and DeFi sales are still under discussion. Last week, over 100 institutions jointly urged the Senate Banking Committee to initiate the bill's review process, pushing the Clarity Act to the next stage. Market structure legislation aims to solidify crypto regulatory rules into law, reducing the risk of future policy reversals.

data.title: Pharos Network's Wish Wu Highlights Growth in Tokenized U.S. Government Debt
data.description: On-chain real-world assets have reached approximately $29.9 billion as of April 2026, according to Wish Wu of Pharos Network. However, Wu noted that institutional adoption remains contingent on blockchain infrastructure aligning with traditional finance standards. Wu highlighted that tokenized U.S. government debt has expanded to nearly $14 billion on-chain. He emphasized that predictable costs, faster settlement, and controlled privacy are essential for wider adoption.

data.title: U.S. Central Command Orders Return of 38 Ships to Iranian Port
data.description: The U.S. Central Command has issued directives for 38 vessels to return to an Iranian port. According to Odaily, this development was reported without further details on the reasons behind the order or the specific port involved.

data.title: Iran has proposed a three-phase negotiation plan to resolve the issue.
data.description: Iranian sources say Iran has conveyed a three-phase negotiation proposal to the US through intermediaries. The first phase focuses on a complete end to the war and guarantees against renewed war against Iran and Lebanon. If an agreement is reached in the first phase, the parties will move to the second phase, which will specifically address the management of the Strait of Hormuz. The third phase relates to nuclear discussions, but Iran will not participate in nuclear negotiations until an agreement is reached in the first two phases. (CCTV)

data.title: High-Stakes Bet on Rockets in NBA Playoffs
data.description:
A significant wager has been placed on the Houston Rockets to defeat the Los Angeles Lakers in the NBA Western Conference first-round Game 4. According to Odaily, an account with a 67% win rate purchased over $260,000 worth of predictions for the Rockets' victory at an average price of 56 cents.

The game is scheduled to start at 9:30 a.m. (UTC+8). The Lakers currently lead the series 3-0. On the Rockets' side, reports indicate that Kevin Durant is expected to miss the fourth game against the Lakers due to a left ankle sprain with a bone bruise. This type of injury typically sidelines players for two to three weeks during the regular season. For the Lakers, Rivers is doubtful due to a left oblique strain, and Doncic will miss the game because of a left hamstring strain.

data.title: KelpDAO Cross-Chain Bridge Exploit Causes $292 Million Bad Debt
data.description:
A vulnerability in KelpDAO's cross-chain bridge has resulted in a bad debt of $292 million. According to PANews, this incident has led to a significant decline in the total value locked (TVL) in decentralized finance (DeFi) by 30% over the past three weeks. Additionally, the interest rates on Aave have surged to 12.4%.

The situation has prompted a closer examination of the real risks associated with DeFi stablecoin yields. Using bond mathematics, it has been revealed that a 5% yield is insufficient to cover the losses incurred. This analysis sheds light on the fair pricing baseline in the DeFi sector.

data.title: Iran Proposes Three-Stage Negotiation Plan to the U.S.
data.description: Iran has reportedly conveyed a three-stage negotiation proposal to the United States through intermediaries. According to PANews, the first stage of the talks focuses on ending the war completely and securing guarantees against renewed hostilities towards Iran and Lebanon. If an agreement is reached in this initial phase, the discussions will move to the second stage, which will specifically address the management of the Strait of Hormuz. The third stage involves nuclear issues, but Iran insists it will not engage in nuclear discussions until agreements are reached in the first two stages.

data.title: STOCKS | Japanese and South Korean Stock Markets Reach New Highs
data.description: The Japanese and South Korean stock markets have both reached new highs. According to Jin10, the Nikkei 225 index in Japan is currently up by 0.47%, while South Korea's KOSPI index has increased by over 1%.

data.title: BOJ Expected to Maintain Interest Rates Amid Yen Concerns
data.description: The Bank of Japan (BOJ) is anticipated to maintain its current interest rates on Tuesday. Bloomberg posted on X that this decision presents a communication challenge for Governor Kazuo Ueda, as the yen remains weak, nearing levels that have previously triggered interventions. The BOJ's stance comes amid ongoing concerns about the currency's stability and its impact on the Japanese economy. Market observers are keenly watching for any signals from the BOJ regarding future monetary policy adjustments.

data.title: Trump: I won't let banks hinder legislation to structure the crypto market.
data.description: At a private event for Trump Meme holders at his Mar-a-Lago resort in Florida, US President Donald Trump stated that the White House will not allow banking lobbying groups to undermine the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act, a bill that would disrupt the structure of the crypto market. He claimed that the crypto industry has entered the mainstream, that "the United States is a leader in crypto," and that banks should not hinder the establishment of a regulatory framework for stablecoins and crypto. The event, described as "the most exclusive meeting in the world," was attended by hundreds of major Trump Meme holders, including Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino, Ark Invest founder Cathie Wood, Anchorage Digital CEO Nathan McCauley, and boxing champion Mike Tyson. Previously, the US banking industry had expressed concerns that stablecoin reward mechanisms could impact traditional deposit businesses, which had previously slowed down the relevant legislative process. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Brazil Blocks 27 Prediction Market Platforms Under New Gambling Rules
data.description: Brazil has imposed a block on 27 prediction market platforms, including Polymarket and Kalshi, as part of new regulations that classify most event-based contracts as gambling. According to NS3.AI, this move follows the issuance of Resolution 5.298 by Brazil's National Monetary Council. The block is set to take effect in early May. However, contracts related to inflation, interest rates, exchange rates, or commodity prices will continue to be permitted under financial market regulations.

data.title: STOCKS | Huatai Securities: Hong Kong Stock Sentiment Neutral, Structural Focus Recommended
data.description:
Huatai Securities released a strategy report on April 27, indicating that the sentiment in Hong Kong stocks has recovered to a neutral level. According to Jin10, factors such as the fluctuating Middle East situation have led to a pullback in expectations for overseas liquidity easing. Combined with the approaching holidays, the upward potential for Hong Kong stocks is currently constrained, with a focus on structural adjustments being crucial.

Huatai Securities advises maintaining allocations along the lines of cash flow certainty and industry certainty. For cash flow certainty, it suggests holding cyclical products with stable cash flow and low capital expenditure pressure, such as coal and aluminum, as well as some low-volatility dividend stocks, including certain local Hong Kong stocks and state-owned banks. For industry certainty, it recommends focusing on the AI chain, which is still on an upward trend, anchored by U.S. stock performance during this week's 'super week.' Investors with a high-risk appetite may consider moderately investing in leading cloud and large model companies.

data.title: DeFi Faces $13 Billion Decline Following Kelp DAO Hack
data.description:
The decentralized finance (DeFi) sector experienced a significant downturn following a hack on Kelp DAO, resulting in approximately $292 million in losses. According to NS3.AI, this incident contributed to a $13 billion decrease in the total value locked (TVL) within DeFi platforms. The decline was primarily due to the liquidation of leveraged positions rather than a direct loss of capital.

Aave, a major player in the DeFi space, witnessed substantial outflows amounting to $8.45 billion within a 48-hour period. This contributed to the overall reduction in DeFi TVL, which has now returned to levels seen a year ago. The hack and subsequent market reactions underscore the vulnerabilities and volatility inherent in the DeFi ecosystem.

data.title: Polymarket Trading Analysis Reveals Concentration of Gains Among Few Accounts
data.description: A revised working paper has analyzed $13.76 billion in Polymarket trading, revealing that 3.14% of accounts captured over 30% of the gains. According to NS3.AI, the study found that 67% of accounts, categorized as unlucky or unskilled losers, absorbed the platform's aggregate losses. Additionally, the paper noted that suspected insider-like accounts were too isolated to account for Polymarket's overall accuracy.
